notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Kody Clemens steals (2) 3rd base. Kody Clemens scores. Throwing error by catcher Salvador Perez on the pickoff attempt.

notableEvents.label: Jonathan India reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Jonathan India reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Royce Lewis.

notableEvents.label: Lane Thomas GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Lane Thomas grounds into a double play, shortstop Tristan Gray to second baseman Luke Keaschall to first baseman Kody Clemens. Jonathan India to 3rd. Isaac Collins out at 2nd. Lane Thomas out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Lane Thomas rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Lane Thomas grounds into a double play, shortstop Tristan Gray to second baseman Luke Keaschall to first baseman Kody Clemens. Jonathan India to 3rd. Isaac Collins out at 2nd. Lane Thomas out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Kody Clemens steals (2) 3rd base. Kody Clemens scores. Throwing error by catcher Salvador Perez on the pickoff attempt.

notableEvents.detail: Victor Caratini grounds into a double play, shortstop Bobby Witt Jr. to second baseman Jonathan India to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino. Luke Keaschall out at 2nd. Victor Caratini out at 1st.
